meaning: n.商人,批发商,贸易商,店主adj.商业的,商人的
examples: Any knowledgeable wine merchant would be able to advise you.
There's been a big reduction in the size of the merchant fleet in recent years.
We sell it to the cotton merchant.
Likewise, Credit Suisse First Boston has talked about an exit from its merchant bank.
The merchant banks could lend no more than the invested capital they had available.
